name: dbw_fca_msgs
description: Drive-by-wire messages for the Chrysler Pacifica

BrakeCmd.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Brake pedal
# Options defined below
float32 pedal_cmd
uint8 pedal_cmd_type

# Enable
bool enable

# Clear driver overrides
bool clear

# Ignore driver overrides
bool ignore

# Watchdog counter (optional)
uint8 count

uint8 CMD_NONE=0
uint8 CMD_PEDAL=1     # Unitless, range 0.15 to 0.50
uint8 CMD_PERCENT=2   # Percent of maximum torque, range 0 to 1
uint8 CMD_TORQUE=3    # Nm, range 0 to 5000, open-loop
uint8 CMD_TORQUE_RQ=4 # Nm, range 0 to 5000, closed-loop
uint8 CMD_DECEL=6     # m/s^2, range 0 to 10

float32 TORQUE_BOO=520  # Nm, brake lights threshold
float32 TORQUE_MAX=5000 # Nm, maximum torque

fields.name: CMD_PERCENT
fields.comment: Percent of maximum torque, range 0 to 1

BrakeInfoReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Brake pedal
float32 brake_pc   # Brake pedal percent, range 0 to 1

# Brake torques (Nm)
float32 brake_torque_request
float32 brake_torque_actual

# Brake pressure (bar)
float32 brake_pressure

# Misc
bool stationary

BrakeReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Brake pedal
# Unitless, range 0.15 to 0.50
float32 pedal_input
float32 pedal_cmd
float32 pedal_output

# Braking torque (Nm)
float32 torque_input
float32 torque_cmd
float32 torque_output

# Braking decel (m/s^2)
float32 decel_cmd
float32 decel_output

# Status
bool enabled  # Enabled
bool override # Driver override
bool driver   # Driver activity
bool timeout  # Command timeout

# Watchdog Counter
WatchdogCounter watchdog_counter
bool watchdog_braking
bool fault_wdc

# Faults
bool fault_ch1
bool fault_ch2
bool fault_power

DoorCmd.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

uint8 NONE=0

uint8 select
uint8 LEFT=1
uint8 RIGHT=2
uint8 TRUNK=3

uint8 action
uint8 OPEN=1
uint8 CLOSE=2

FrontFanSpeed.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 NONE=0
uint8 MIN=1
uint8 MAX=7

FrontTemp.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 NONE=0
uint8 MIN=59 # DegF
uint8 MAX=85 # DegF

FuelLevelReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Fuel level (%, 0 to 100)
float32 fuel_level

# 12V battery voltage
float32 battery_12v

# Odometer (km, 0.1km resolution)
float32 odometer

Gear.raw:
uint8 gear

uint8 NONE=0
uint8 PARK=1
uint8 REVERSE=2
uint8 NEUTRAL=3
uint8 DRIVE=4
uint8 LOW=5

GearCmd.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Gear command enumeration
Gear cmd

# Clear driver overrides
bool clear

GearNum.raw:
uint8 num

uint8 NONE=0
uint8 DRIVE_D01=1
uint8 DRIVE_D02=2
uint8 DRIVE_D03=3
uint8 DRIVE_D04=4
uint8 DRIVE_D05=5
uint8 DRIVE_D06=6
uint8 DRIVE_D07=7
uint8 DRIVE_D08=8
uint8 DRIVE_D09=9
uint8 DRIVE_D10=10
uint8 NEUTRAL=16
uint8 REVERSE_R01=17
uint8 REVERSE_R02=18
uint8 PARK=31

GearReject.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 NONE=0              # Not rejected
uint8 SHIFT_IN_PROGRESS=1 # Shift in progress
uint8 OVERRIDE=2          # Override on brake, throttle, or steering
uint8 VEHICLE=5           # Rejected by vehicle (try pressing the brakes)
uint8 UNSUPPORTED=6       # Unsupported gear command
uint8 FAULT=7             # System in fault state

fields.name: OVERRIDE
fields.comment: Override on brake, throttle, or steering

fields.name: VEHICLE
fields.comment: Rejected by vehicle (try pressing the brakes)

GearReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Current gear enumeration
Gear state

# Gear command enumeration
Gear cmd

# Gear reject enumeration
GearReject reject

# Status
bool ready
bool override

# Faults
bool fault_bus

HighBeam.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 IDLE=0
uint8 HIBM_FLASH_ON=1
uint8 HIBM_ON=2

HvacButtonCmd.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

uint8 cmd

uint8 NONE=0
uint8 OFF=1
uint8 ON=2

HvacSeat.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 NONE=0
uint8 OFF=1
uint8 LO=2
uint8 HI=3

Ignition.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 UNKNOWN=0
uint8 OFF=1
uint8 ACCESSORY=2
uint8 RUN=3

Misc1Report.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Turn Signal enumeration
TurnSignal turn_signal

# Highbeam headlights / flash to pass enumeration
HighBeam high_beam

# Front Windshield Wipers enumeration
Wiper wiper

# Buttons
bool btn_cc_on_off    # Cruise Control On/Off Toggle
bool btn_cc_res       # Cruise Control Resume
bool btn_cc_cncl      # Cruise Control Cancel
bool btn_cc_set_inc   # Cruise Control Set+
bool btn_cc_set_dec   # Cruise Control Set-
bool btn_cc_gap_inc   # Cruise Control Gap+
bool btn_cc_gap_dec   # Cruise Control Gap-
bool btn_cc_mode      # Cruise Control Mode
bool btn_ld_ok        # Left D-Pad OK
bool btn_ld_up        # Left D-Pad Up
bool btn_ld_down      # Left D-Pad Down
bool btn_ld_left      # Left D-Pad Left
bool btn_ld_right     # Left D-Pad Right

# Faults
bool fault_bus

# Doors
bool door_rear_left
bool door_rear_right
bool door_trunk

Misc2Report.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Front Driver Temperature Status
FrontTemp ft_drv_temp

# Front Passenger Temperature Status
FrontTemp ft_psg_temp

# Front Fan Speed Status
FrontFanSpeed ft_fan_speed

# Front Button Status
bool max_ac
bool ac
bool ft_hvac
bool auto_md
bool recirc
bool sync
bool r_defr
bool f_defr

# Vent Mode Status
VentMode vent_mode

# Heated Steering Wheel Status
bool heated_steering_wheel

# Front Left Heated Seat Status
HvacSeat fl_heated_seat

# Front Left Vented Seat Status
HvacSeat fl_vented_seat

# Front Right Heated Seat Status
HvacSeat fr_heated_seat

# Front Right Vented Seat Status
HvacSeat fr_vented_seat

MiscCmd.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Turn signal command enumeration
TurnSignal cmd

# Door open/close command
DoorCmd door

# Front Driver Temperature Command
FrontTemp ft_drv_temp

# Front Passenger Temperature Command
FrontTemp ft_psg_temp

# Front Fan Speed Command
FrontFanSpeed ft_fan_speed

# Front Button Command
HvacButtonCmd max_ac
HvacButtonCmd ac
HvacButtonCmd ft_hvac
HvacButtonCmd auto_md
HvacButtonCmd recirc
HvacButtonCmd sync
HvacButtonCmd r_defr
HvacButtonCmd f_defr

# Front Vent Mode Command
VentMode vent_mode

# Heated Steering Wheel Command
HvacButtonCmd heated_steering_wheel

# Front Left Heated Seat Command
HvacSeat fl_heated_seat

# Front Left Vented Seat Command
HvacSeat fl_vented_seat

# Front Right Heated Seat Command
HvacSeat fr_heated_seat

# Front Right Vented Seat Command
HvacSeat fr_vented_seat

SteeringCmd.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Steering Wheel
float32 steering_wheel_angle_cmd        # rad, range -9.6 to 9.6
float32 steering_wheel_angle_velocity   # rad/s, range 0 to 17.5, 0 = default
float32 steering_wheel_torque_cmd       # Nm, range -5.0 to 5.0
uint8 cmd_type

# Enable
bool enable

# Clear driver overrides
bool clear

# Ignore driver overrides
bool ignore

# Disable or activate the driver override audible warning
bool quiet
bool alert

# Watchdog counter (optional)
uint8 count

# Command types
uint8 CMD_ANGLE=0
uint8 CMD_TORQUE=1

# Maximum values
float32 ANGLE_MAX=9.6     # rad, maximum angle
float32 VELOCITY_MAX=17.5 # rad/s, maximum velocity
float32 TORQUE_MAX=5.0    # Nm, maximum torque

SteeringReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Steering Wheel
float32 steering_wheel_angle      # rad
float32 steering_wheel_cmd        # rad or Nm
float32 steering_wheel_torque     # Nm
uint8 steering_wheel_cmd_type

# Command types
uint8 CMD_ANGLE=0
uint8 CMD_TORQUE=1

# Vehicle Speed
float32 speed                     # m/s

# Status
bool enabled  # Enabled
bool override # Driver override
bool timeout  # Command timeout

# Watchdog Counter
bool fault_wdc

# Faults
bool fault_bus1
bool fault_bus2
bool fault_calibration
bool fault_power

ThrottleCmd.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Throttle pedal
# Options defined below
float32 pedal_cmd
uint8 pedal_cmd_type

# Enable
bool enable

# Clear driver overrides
bool clear

# Ignore driver overrides
bool ignore

# Watchdog counter (optional)
uint8 count

uint8 CMD_NONE=0
uint8 CMD_PEDAL=1   # Unitless, range 0.15 to 0.80
uint8 CMD_PERCENT=2 # Percent of maximum throttle, range 0 to 1

fields.name: CMD_PERCENT
fields.comment: Percent of maximum throttle, range 0 to 1

ThrottleInfoReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Throttle Pedal
float32 throttle_pc   # Throttle pedal percent, range 0 to 1

# Engine
float32 axle_torque   # Driver Intended Axle Torque (Nm)

# Gear Num
GearNum gear_num      # Gear Number

# Ignition status
Ignition ignition     # Ignition status (enum)

ThrottleReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Throttle pedal
# Unitless, range 0.15 to 0.80
float32 pedal_input
float32 pedal_cmd
float32 pedal_output

# Status
bool enabled  # Enabled
bool override # Driver override
bool driver   # Driver activity
bool timeout  # Command timeout

# Watchdog Counter
WatchdogCounter watchdog_counter
bool fault_wdc

# Faults
bool fault_ch1
bool fault_ch2
bool fault_power

TirePressureReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Tire pressures (kPa)
float32 front_left
float32 front_right
float32 rear_left
float32 rear_right

TurnSignal.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 NONE=0
uint8 LEFT=1
uint8 RIGHT=2
uint8 HAZARD=3

VentMode.raw:
uint8 value

uint8 NONE=0
uint8 DEFROST=1
uint8 DEFROST_FLOOR=3
uint8 FLOOR=5
uint8 FLOOR_FACE=7
uint8 FACE=9

WatchdogCounter.raw:
uint8 source

uint8 NONE=0               # No source for watchdog counter fault
uint8 OTHER_BRAKE=1        # Fault determined by brake controller
uint8 OTHER_THROTTLE=2     # Fault determined by throttle controller
uint8 OTHER_STEERING=3     # Fault determined by steering controller
uint8 BRAKE_COUNTER=4      # Brake command counter failed to increment
uint8 BRAKE_DISABLED=5     # Brake transition to disabled while in gear or moving
uint8 BRAKE_COMMAND=6      # Brake command timeout after 100ms
uint8 BRAKE_REPORT=7       # Brake report timeout after 100ms
uint8 THROTTLE_COUNTER=8   # Throttle command counter failed to increment
uint8 THROTTLE_DISABLED=9  # Throttle transition to disabled while in gear or moving
uint8 THROTTLE_COMMAND=10  # Throttle command timeout after 100ms
uint8 THROTTLE_REPORT=11   # Throttle report timeout after 100ms
uint8 STEERING_COUNTER=12  # Steering command counter failed to increment
uint8 STEERING_DISABLED=13 # Steering transition to disabled while in gear or moving
uint8 STEERING_COMMAND=14  # Steering command timeout after 100ms
uint8 STEERING_REPORT=15   # Steering report timeout after 100ms

fields.name: NONE
fields.comment: No source for watchdog counter fault

fields.name: BRAKE_COUNTER
fields.comment: Brake command counter failed to increment

fields.name: BRAKE_DISABLED
fields.comment: Brake transition to disabled while in gear or moving

fields.name: THROTTLE_COUNTER
fields.comment: Throttle command counter failed to increment

fields.name: THROTTLE_DISABLED
fields.comment: Throttle transition to disabled while in gear or moving

fields.name: STEERING_COUNTER
fields.comment: Steering command counter failed to increment

fields.name: STEERING_DISABLED
fields.comment: Steering transition to disabled while in gear or moving

WheelPositionReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Wheel positions (counts)
int16 front_left
int16 front_right
int16 rear_left
int16 rear_right

# Conversion factor (TODO)
#float32 COUNTS_PER_REV=XXX

WheelSpeedReport.raw:
std_msgs/Header header

# Wheel speeds (rad/s)
float32 front_left
float32 front_right
float32 rear_left
float32 rear_right

Wiper.raw:
uint8 status

uint8 OFF=0
uint8 MANUAL_ON=4
uint8 MANUAL_LOW=5
uint8 MANUAL_HIGH=6
uint8 MIST_FLICK=7
uint8 WASH=8
uint8 FLT=14
